outlook.summary: The market is pinned directly beneath the massive 7150 Resonance Call Wall. Aggregate GEX is heavily positive (32.89B+), placing dealers in a deep long-gamma position. This structural setup actively suppresses volatility and favors tight range-bound trading. While the 0DTE smirk skew indicates underlying bearishness, dealer hedging dynamics will aggressively fade breakouts, magnetizing the spot price toward the 7050 Max Pain and Weekly Gamma Flip levels.

levels.motivazione: Highest Call OI in 0DTE (13,483) creates a hard structural ceiling against upside volatility.
